subcodes.first_line: O Isma'il! My Most Exalted Pen hath spoken at morn and eventide in such wise that the horizons have been filled with verses [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمعیل قد نطق قلمی الاعلی فی الصباح و المساء علی شان ملئت الافاق من آیات
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @exhortations and counsels, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
